title: Conversation surface
subtitle: Reuse the existing Loong runtime through a browser-first shell.
emptyState: Start a new conversation or open an existing session.
inputPlaceholder: Ask Loong about runtime, tools, or workflow...

errors.transportFailure: Provider connection failed while contacting {{host}}. If you use a proxy, route this host DIRECT and add it to fake-ip-filter. You can confirm the current diagnosis in Runtime console > Provider route.
errors.streamEndedUnexpectedly: The live stream ended before the turn reported a final status. Web reloaded local history, but this turn may still need a manual refresh.

loading.connectingA: Loong is joining the flight path
loading.connectingC: Loong is looking for stable air
loading.hintConnecting: The provider connection is still in progress. If there is no error yet, this turn still has a chance to complete.
loading.hintThinking: The request is already out. Loong is waiting on or shaping the response.
loading.hintStreaming: Incremental text is already arriving. This turn is still actively generating.
